summary:
Claim: Topical steroids are most effective in eczematous dermatitis.  
Evidence: - Eczematous dermatitis involves strong T-cell-mediated inflammation directly suppressed by topical corticosteroids. - These agents provide rapid, reliable relief of symptoms such as erythema, edema, and intense pruritus specific to this condition.  
Answer: B
